div.p: Engineers must implement methods based on the following byte-aligned structures:

ul.li: Memory Layout: CostModelConfig is explicitly padded to 64 bytes to prevent false sharing in multi-threaded planning environments.
Index Selectivity: StatisticsCatalog uses HyperLogLog for distinct value estimations.
